chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-1687 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on CMA No.16389/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on Misc. No.29729/2022 (Withdrawal of case) 3. For order as to non-prosecution of CMA No.14662/2022 4. For order as to non-prosecution of CMA No.14663/2022 5. For hearing of CMA No.7619/2022 6. For hearing of CMA No.7620/2022 7. For hearing of main case 18.8.2025 Mr. Sawan Meghwar advocate for the petitioner Mr, Tassaduq Nadeem advocate for SBCA Mr. Sumair Hussain advocate for respondent No.2 -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2. Learned counsel for the petitioner has filed CMA No.29729 of 2022 for withdrawal of the instant petition. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as withdrawn alongwith listed / pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
